contact_links.intro: If you'd like to support my work:

bio.name: Corey Pellizzi
bio.heading: Biography
paragraphs: Corey Pellizzi is a multifaceted creative professional with expertise spanning comedy, music production, filmmaking, and writing. Known for his innovative approach to entertainment and storytelling, Corey has built a diverse portfolio of work that showcases his versatility and unique comedic vision.

featured_projects.title: Open Mic Odyssey
featured_projects.description: Three best friends embark on an outrageous adventure.

featured_projects.title: Super Silly Show
featured_projects.description: Join Corky and Beefroast as they host a variety show like no other! Weekly comedy and entertainment.

projects.title: Support
projects.description: Support the work through Ko-Fi, where you can make one-time donations or subscribe for ongoing support. Your contributions help fund new projects and content creation.

projects.title: Original Music
projects.description: Creating and releasing original music under the Owl Movement and Corky Time brands. Music is available across streaming platforms including SoundCloud, with new uploads from the Corkyverse regularly added.

projects.title: Comedy Videos & Content
projects.description: Comedy sketches, performances, and other video content available on YouTube. Features live shows, vlogs, interviews, and various entertainment media.

projects.title: Super Silly Show
projects.description: Join Corky and Beefroast as they host a variety show like no other! A weekly show featuring comedy, music, and entertainment. Available on multiple platforms including YouTube, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and SoundCloud.
